creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
In <20060925113026.2C1A516A549@hub.freebsd.org>, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> typed:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/py-xlib,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/103614 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103614

A proper patch for python-xlib .13 can be found in:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=103650

	<mike
